steps.t: The brigand encampment is at Narrowcleeve, the heights in the south-west part of the Marish, not far from Woodhall. You can enter the camp by crossing…
The Thain is at the Great Smials in Tuckborough. The Thain, Paladin Took, sent you to destroy Hyacinth Took's stolen fireworks at a brigand encampment…
